/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/OpenGLHello.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/OpenGLHello.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLHello.dir/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLHello.dir/shaderProgram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLHello.dir/complexBigNum.cpp.o -o OpenGLHello  /usr/lib/libGL.so /usr/lib/libGLU.so /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 -lgmp -lgmpxx /usr/lib/libgomp.so /usr/lib/libpthread.a
